parsed_review.summary: CP00-436 is a descriptor-only RP14.P04.M04 "Secondary Workflow Slice" pack (risk A, 10 units, RP14.P04.M04.S10-S19). The pack-level claim is supported: production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false (implementation_layer=descriptor, status=implemented_pending_review), so there is no production over-claim. Cross-layer consistency is complete and exact: the live closeout-pack-plan.json entry (line 410), manifest plan_binding_snapshot/included_units, contract projection (current_pack_id, pack_binding, cp436_requirements, cp436_no_write_attestation, p04_workflow_slice_descriptor, historical_pack_bindings tail), registry CP436 binding+requirements, service/validators implementations, tests, validator script, and README#cp00-436 all agree on risk A, 10 units, S10-S19, deliverable distribution {security_audit:1,implementation:3,ui:2,fixture:1,test:1,hermes_evidence:1,claude_review:1}, and micro_title {Secondary Workflow Slice:10}. All 7 required public exports exist (service.js: createSettlementCoreCp436P04WorkflowSliceCaseSet/Descriptor; validators.js: validateSettlementCoreCp436Coverage, validateSettlementCoreCp436P04WorkflowSliceDescriptor, createSettlementCoreCp436HermesEvidencePacket/ClaudeReviewPacket/CloseoutHandoff). The settlement source has no fs/network/DB/process/child_process/runtime dispatch — all "database/write/dispatch" hits are descriptor attestation flags set false. freezeCp436Result and freezeCp436Validation stamp synthetic_only/no_real_data/writes_product_state=false plus the full no-runtime/no-leak attestation, and validators enforce descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false per row, no Claude promotion, and no enterprise-trust-from-local-validation. The validator script does deepEqual drift checks between the contract projection and the freshly generated descriptor/requirements/attestation. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only (allowed_claude_tools Read/Grep/Glob), claude_is_final_approval=false, and Hermes is used only as a deterministic evidence packet (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Review-infrastructure hardening passed: readiness auth_preflight exit 0 with 1446-byte valid-JSON stdout, prompt 2194B within 25600B limit, schema present, forbidden tools absent, summary-only correctly prohibited; forbidden_review_evidence enumerates the CP178+ rejections (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, missing fields, final-approval/enterprise-trust claims). command-evidence records all node --check/--test and rp05-rp14/closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/control-plane/goal:closeout/fullplan/npm test/validate/build/git diff --check at exit 0, with Hermes gate H14 passed. Changed-file scope is clean: the 7 modified refs are in active_pack_implementation_refs (index.js referenced but unmodified is fine), untracked unrelated files are correctly preserved/excluded, and no active untracked implementation files were omitted. One non-blocking P3: the post-review evidence artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet on disk, which is the expected state at the read_only_claude_run stage of the hardening sequence.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts not yet present (expected at this hardening stage)
findings.details: The manifest evidence_refs and required_pack_artifacts list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-436/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist on disk. This is correct sequencing, not a defect: per pack_level_claude_review.hardening_sequence the read_only Claude run (this review) precedes normalize -> receipt_validate -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation -> commit, so those artifacts and raw-output.json/review-receipt.json are produced from this review run afterward. pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending' with empty valid_review_receipts, consistent with this stage.
findings.recommendation: No change to the pack. Before commit, ensure the downstream sequence generates claude-review-result.json (from this accepted review), adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, and that npm run closeout-pack:validate and git diff --check --cached pass; do not commit while these required artifacts are absent.
